found_supplies.title: Abandoned Cache
found_supplies.description: Your scouts discover an abandoned supply cache hidden in the ruins of an old watchtower.

outcomes.outcome_description: You take all the supplies, ensuring your group has enough food and resources.
You take only the essentials, boosting the morale of your followers.

refugees_join.title: Refugees Seek Shelter
refugees_join.description: A small group of refugees fleeing the forest asks to join your exodus.

outcomes.outcome_description: You welcome the refugees, providing them with food and shelter.
You turn away the refugees, which lowers the morale of your group.

good_hunting.title: Abundant Game
good_hunting.description: Your hunters spot a herd of deer grazing in a nearby meadow.

outcomes.outcome_description: Your skilled hunters bring back a large haul of food.
You decide to let the deer pass, hoping for another opportunity later.

friendly_traders.title: Traveling Merchants
friendly_traders.description: A caravan of merchants offers to trade with you.

outcomes.outcome_description: You begin a trade with the merchants, potentially gaining valuable supplies.
You decline the offer, choosing to rely on your current supplies.

bandit_ambush.title: Bandit Ambush!
bandit_ambush.description: Bandits emerge from the treeline, demanding your supplies!

outcomes.outcome_description: You bravely confront the bandits in an attempt to protect your supplies.
You choose to pay the bandits to avoid conflict, sacrificing some of your gold.
You attempt to negotiate with the bandits, hoping to resolve the situation peacefully.

disease_outbreak.title: Disease Outbreak
disease_outbreak.description: A fever spreads through the camp. Many are falling ill.

outcomes.outcome_description: You use your medicine to treat the sick, but some followers still succumb to the illness.
You decide to quarantine the sick, but the disease spreads, taking a toll on your followers.

harsh_storm.title: Violent Storm
harsh_storm.description: Dark clouds gather and a fierce storm batters your caravan.

outcomes.outcome_description: You push through the storm, suffering losses but maintaining your course.
You decide to make camp, losing a day but protecting your followers from the storm.

deserters.title: Deserters
deserters.description: Some followers have lost faith and are planning to leave.

outcomes.outcome_description: You allow the deserters to leave, which weakens your group.
You spend gold to inspire the remaining followers to stay, but some still leave.

mysterious_shrine.title: Ancient Shrine
mysterious_shrine.description: You discover an ancient elven shrine, still radiating faint magic.

outcomes.outcome_description: You pray at the shrine, hoping for a blessing in your journey.
You take offerings from the shrine, gaining gold but at the cost of morale.
You choose to leave the shrine undisturbed, respecting its ancient power.
